default_action.description: The default action returned for the specified verdict reason in a fingerprint lookup when no overrides are specified.

override_action.description: If not null, this action will be returned for the specified verdict reason in a fingerprint lookup, in place of the default action.

override_created_at.description: The time when the override was created, if one exists. Values conform to the RFC 3339 standard and are expressed in UTC, e.g. `2021-12-29T12:33:09Z`.

override_description.description: A description of the override, if one exists.
